reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a message, received a response within seconds, and confirmed the response contains the number "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with three agents visible in the sidebar.
Located the "QA-20260419-010307-ps1w" agent in the sidebar — Agent found and visible in the sidebar list.
Verified agent status — Status displayed as "idle", which is a valid operational state (matches requirement for "running" or "idle").
Clicked on the "QA-20260419-010307-ps1w" agent card — Agent detail page opened, showing the conversation interface.
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field — Message appeared in the input field, send button became enabled.
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was submitted successfully.
Waited for agent response — Response received in approximately 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout).
Verified response content — Agent responded with "4", which correctly answers the math question 2+2=4.
Took screenshot showing the response — Screenshot captured showing the user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent's response "4" with "Worked for 1s" timing indicator.
